case_title: ROMERO LIDIA VS JARVIS LARRY DBA OZ MOVERS et al

docket_entries.description: SUBPENA DUCES TECUM AS TO JIM WILLIAMS SF HOUSING AUTHORITY FILED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JARVIS LARRY DBA OZ MOVERS OSWALD JEAN DBA.OZ MOVERS SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
PLTF INSISTED UPON FILING A CLAIM AGAINST THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY WITH- OUT THE LETTER OF DENIAL FROM THAT CITY AGENCY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMERO LIDIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JARVIS LARRY DBA OZ MOVERS OSWALD JEAN DBA.OZ MOVERS SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY $250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $250.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY ROMERO LIDIA AS TO DEFENDANT JARVIS LARRY DBA OZ MOVERS OSWALD JEAN DBA.OZ MOVERS SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-27-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-16-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
REM: LTR. BY VICTORIA ADAMS FOR SFHA. HAND DELIVERED TO SC. OFFICE, FILED & ENTERED.
NOTICE OF ATTEMPTS OF SERVICE FILED.
